audit.summary: New Farm Deli has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: proof is not doing enough work.

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "New Farm Deli and Café: Authentic Italian Dining in Brisbane". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Deli".
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Deli" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.

followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on New Farm Deli: the main opportunity I noticed is Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.. Worth me sending the short audit?
